payWithMetaMask: Pay with MetaMask USDT to top up your turns.
freeMonthlyTurns: Every user gets 3 free turns each month, regardless of plan
freeFirst: Free turns are used first, then paid turns
freeReset: Free turns reset on the 1st of each month
paidNeverExpire: Paid turns via MetaMask never expire and carry over month to month
unlimitedTurns: You have unlimited tarot reading turns!
usedAllTurns: You've used all your turns! Top up to keep reading.

pricing.subtitle: Unlock the ancient wisdom of Tarot with AI-powered readings that illuminate your path
pricing.whySubtitle: Experience the future of Tarot reading with AI-powered insights that honor ancient wisdom
pricing.aiInsightsDesc: Advanced AI trained on centuries of Tarot wisdom provides personalized interpretations
pricing.sacredTraditionsDesc: Authentic Tarot spreads and interpretations rooted in mystical traditions
pricing.personalGrowthDesc: Track your spiritual journey with detailed reading history and insights
pricing.faq1Q: How accurate are AI Tarot readings?
pricing.faq1A: Our AI is trained on traditional Tarot interpretations and provides insights based on established meanings and symbolism. Remember, Tarot is a tool for reflection and guidance, not prediction.
pricing.faq2A: No, purchased turns never expire. You can use them whenever you want. Your free monthly turns reset each month, but any purchased turns carry over.
pricing.faq3Q: What's the difference between the plans?
pricing.faq3A: The Free plan offers 5 readings per month, Mystic provides 10 reading turns with advanced features, and Oracle includes 20 reading turns with exclusive content and premium features.
